Class AuditEntry<T>

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.model.AuditEntry<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the target object that was acted upon
public class AuditEntry<T> extends Object
Represents a single audit log entry recording who performed an action, what was affected, and when. Instances are immutable once created to preserve the integrity of the audit trail.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AuditEntry(Staff staff, String action, T target, LocalDateTime timestamp)
    Constructs an AuditEntry with the given staff, action, target, and timestamp.
    AuditEntry(AuditEntry<T> other)
    Copy constructor that creates a new AuditEntry with all field values copied from other.

  • Constructor Details

    • AuditEntry

      public AuditEntry(Staff staff, String action, T target, LocalDateTime timestamp)
      Constructs an AuditEntry with the given staff, action, target, and timestamp. The timestamp should represent the moment the action was performed; no argument may be null.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member who performed the action; must not be null
      action - a short description of the action; must not be null or blank
      target - the object that was acted upon; must not be null
      timestamp - the date and time the action occurred; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null or action is blank

    • AuditEntry

      public AuditEntry(AuditEntry<T> other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new AuditEntry with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same staff, action, target reference, and timestamp.
      Parameters:
      other - the AuditEntry instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getStaff

      public Staff getStaff()
      Returns the staff member who performed the action. Never null for a validly constructed entry.
      Returns:
      the staff member

    • getAction

      public String getAction()
      Returns the description of the action performed. Never null or blank for a validly constructed entry.
      Returns:
      the action string

    • getTarget

      public T getTarget()
      Returns the target object that was acted upon. Never null for a validly constructed entry.
      Returns:
      the target object

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns the timestamp of when the action was performed. Never null for a validly constructed entry.
      Returns:
      the timestamp

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is an AuditEntry with equal staff, action, target, and timestamp. Equality is value-based since audit entries have no unique ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if all fields are equal

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on all fields. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this audit entry including staff, action, target, and timestamp.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this audit entry
